api_key.hint: API key for the image generation service

model.hint: For example: gpt-5.3-codex (the model must be able to use the image_generation tool)

image_size.hint: Optional. Passed to the image_generation tool as size, for example: 1024x1024 or 1536x1024. Command-line --size and LLM tool size override this value.

reference_prompt_edit.hint: Used for aiedit or auto mode with reference images. Supports multiple lines; each non-empty line becomes one instruction.
reference_prompt_edit.default: 只修改用户明确要求修改的内容；未提及的主体身份、数量、构图、比例、姿态、背景关系和关键细节尽量保持不变。

reference_prompt_selfie.hint: Used for selfie mode. Supports multiple lines; each non-empty line becomes one instruction.
reference_prompt_selfie.default: 参考图片仅作为人物与外观依据；优先保持人物身份、脸部特征和整体一致性，根据用户要求生成自然的自拍照片效果。

text_mode_use_white_reference_image.description: Use white reference image in text mode
text_mode_use_white_reference_image.hint: When enabled, text-to-image mode silently adds one built-in white image as a reference to reduce upstream model dilution.

send_generated_image_in_chat.hint: When enabled, successful LLM tool image generation will send the image directly into the current conversation instead of only returning status text.

selfie_reference_images.hint: Upload one or more reference images in WebUI. They will be merged with images saved by the selfie_ref set command.
